description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is finished in light gray cladding, complemented by large rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The property features a gated driveway leading to a garage, landscaped front and rear gardens with shrubs, trees, and flower beds, and a small patio area. The main entrance is accentuated by a simple porch and a solid front door, flanked by decorative plants. The rear of the house includes a balcony and a staircase leading to the garden, while the side structure appears to be an attached garage or auxiliary space. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on straight lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with light gray cladding, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a gated driveway with an attached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped front yard, driveway, and garage gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the driveway, garage, and additional garden space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, balcony, exterior staircase, and green lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, garage, and rear patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple porch with a solid door, minimal steps, and flanked by decorative plants
